mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM bed b LEFT JOIN room r ON b.room_id = r.id WHERE b.status = 1 AND (r.status IS NULL OR r.status != 2)

SELECT b.id, b.room_id AS roomId, b.bed_no AS bedNo, b.status, b.elderly_id AS elderlyId, r.room_no AS roomNo, r.status AS roomStatus, e.name AS elderlyName, e.gender AS elderlyGender, e.age AS elderlyAge, e.emergency_contact AS elderlyEmergencyContact, e.emergency_phone AS elderlyEmergencyPhone, e.check_in_date AS checkInDate FROM bed b INNER JOIN ( SELECT b2.id FROM bed b2 LEFT JOIN room r2 ON b2.room_id = r2.id ORDER BY r2.room_no ASC, b2.bed_no ASC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize} ) page_ids ON b.id = page_ids.id LEFT JOIN room r ON b.room_id = r.id LEFT JOIN elderly e ON b.elderly_id = e.id ORDER BY r.room_no ASC, b.bed_no ASC
